title: BARGAINS-GALORE 2 X 1W COB LED Carabiner Keyring Light Camping Torch Bright Portable Anti Slip
features: HIGH QUALITY BRAND NEW EASY TO USE
This slim design keyring is manufactured with a super bright COB LED & handy carabiner hook.
It requires 2 x CR2032 button batteries which are supplied.
It is ideal for camping, vehicle, emergency, household use etc.
PLEASE NOTE THAT RANDOM COLOURS WILL BE SENT!
